features.name: dist constraint in conditional constraint block
features.description: Code should include a class with a rand bit variable and a constraint block that uses dist distribution inside an if conditional statement

features.name: constraint distribution operator with weighted values
features.description: Code should include a constraint using the dist operator with weighted distribution values
features.snippet:
rand bit b;
constraint c { b dist {1 := 1, 0 := 0}; }
